title: Enforce Minimum Password Complexity and Change Requirements
description: Enforce a minimum password complexity and change of characters when new passwords are created.

checks.name: Password Complexity is Enabled
checks.purpose: Verify Password must meet complexity requirements is enabled in the local or domain password policy

checks.name: Minimum Password Length Meets Requirement
checks.purpose: Confirm minimum password length is set to at least 14 characters in the local or domain password policy

checks.name: Password Complexity is Enabled
checks.purpose: Verify Password must meet complexity requirements is enabled in the domain password policy

checks.name: Minimum Password Length Meets Requirement
checks.purpose: Confirm minimum password length is set to at least 14 characters in the domain password policy

checks.name: Fine-Grained Password Policy Enforces Stricter Rules for Admins
checks.purpose: Verify a Fine-Grained Password Policy (FGPP) applies stricter length and complexity requirements to privileged accounts

checks.name: PAM Password Quality Requirements are Configured
checks.purpose: Verify pam_pwquality or pam_cracklib is configured in /etc/pam.d/common-password with minlen and minclass requirements

checks.name: Minimum Password Length Meets Requirement
checks.purpose: Confirm minlen in /etc/security/pwquality.conf is set to at least 14 characters

checks.name: Password Complexity Classes are Enforced
checks.purpose: Verify minclass is set to at least 3 in /etc/security/pwquality.conf to require mixed character classes

checks.name: PAM Password Quality Requirements are Configured
checks.purpose: Verify pam_pwquality is configured in /etc/pam.d/common-password with minlen and minclass on Debian

checks.name: Minimum Password Length Meets Requirement
checks.purpose: Confirm minlen in /etc/security/pwquality.conf is set to at least 14 characters on Debian

checks.name: Password Complexity Classes are Enforced
checks.purpose: Verify minclass is set to at least 3 in /etc/security/pwquality.conf on Debian

remediation: Enable password complexity requirements and set minimum length to 14+ characters via GPO. Configure Fine-Grained Password Policies for privileged accounts. On Linux, install libpam-pwquality and configure minlen=14 and minclass=3 in /etc/security/pwquality.conf.
